items.builder_takeaway: First-hand operational report on a risk that affects every public-facing site a solo dev runs.

items.builder_takeaway: Potentially significant OSS milestone for anyone running Postgres, which includes Fuzzy's Hetzner stack.

items.title: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
items.uncertainty: The 100% regression-suite claim is the author's own and has not been independently verified; production viability unknown.
